summary: Horizontally scrollable mobile route navigation corresponding to the active area's desktop BarNav.
useWhen: ShellApp is rendering the below-768px routed workspace and the active area has peer route sections.
avoidWhen: Choices switch local content without navigation; use TabGroup.
Rendering the desktop or tablet secondary navigation; use BarNav.

alternatives.when: The choices switch local content without changing routes.

accessibility: The row is a named navigation landmark and the selected section exposes aria-current.
Disabled route sections remain visible but cannot emit navigation intent.
states: The host router owns the current URL and handles dsTabChange.
Detail routes that do not match a section show the active-area heading.
responsiveBehavior: The row scrolls horizontally without wrapping and centers the selected section when selection changes.

customElements: Assign tabs as a JavaScript property and update currentUrl and basePath with router state.
react: Pass the same BarNavTab array used by the desktop BarNav through the generated React wrapper.
angular: Import the generated standalone adapter and bind tabs as a property.
